headline: Is Coca-Cola (KO) Still Priced Fairly After Strong Multi Year Share Gains?
summary: For readers wondering whether Coca-Cola at around US$79.54 is still a fair deal or starting to look expensive, this article walks through the numbers so you can judge the stock's value for yourself. The stock has returned 1.1% over the past week, 1.4% over the past month, 15.1% year to date, 14.0% over 1 year, 44.5% over 3 years and 64.9% over 5 years. Those figures naturally raise questions about how that performance lines up with today's price. Recent headlines around Coca-Cola continue to...
